abort.no_devices_found: No Specialized Turbo bikes found. Make sure the bike is powered on and Bluetooth is enabled.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the bike. Make sure it is powered on and in Bluetooth range.

data_description.pin: The 4-digit PIN displayed on the bike's TCU screen during Bluetooth pairing. Leave empty if your bike does not require a PIN.

data_description.address: Select the Specialized Turbo bike you want to add.
